security.csp: default-src 'self'; img-src 'self' data: asset: http://asset.localhost; style-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline'; connect-src ipc: http://ipc.localhost

bundle.shortDescription: Personal memory vault for AI agents — V0.1 alpha
bundle.longDescription: Memory Vault is a personal, user-owned memory layer for AI agents. V0.1 internal alpha — see ADR-010 (LanceDB plaintext-on-disk) and ADR-031 (unsigned MSI) for V0.1 scope-discipline deviations from BRD §11.
